title: ilex excavata
intro: Ilex excavata, also known as Japanese holly or Makomo, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The leaves and stems of Ilex excavata contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Ilex excavata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
